channel.title: Media on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Media on Systology

item.title: Video Transcoding & Streaming Pipeline
item.description: An inherently scalable video ingestion and transcoding system architecture; asynchronously chunking heavy media, extracting actionable features, and steadily outputting adaptive bitrates via worker pools.

item.title: Global CDN Media Serving
item.description: A robust edge-optimized CDN-backed media delivery architecture; designed explicitly for seamless, highly available global media serving with completely decoupled background upload processing.

item.title: Media Analysis
item.description: Best practices for resilient media feature extraction pipelines; ensuring stable representation schemas, choosing between streaming and batch modes, enforcing metadata preservation, and performance engineering.

item.title: Photohaul
item.description: A robust Java-based tool engineered for seamlessly organizing and migrating extensive photo collections; featuring rigorous deduplication, automatic metadata preservation, and resumable execution.

item.title: Video Analysis
item.description: An exploration of multimodal video feature extraction comparing Apple-native frameworks (Vision, AVFoundation, Core Image) against cross-platform C++/Python toolchains (OpenCV, pybind11) for ML prep.
